changes_summary:
Major revisions addressing all three significant flags:

**FLAG-001 (provider mounting):** Moved GallerySelectionContext from video-editor scope to `src/shared/contexts/` and mounted it in `AppProviders.tsx` (after PanesProvider), making it accessible to both the layout-level GenerationsPane and the VideoEditorShell-level AgentChat.

**FLAG-002 (backend semantics):** Added Steps 10-12 to extend the agent backend. Added optional `generation_id` field to `SelectedClipPayload`, updated `resolveClipGenerationIds` to fall back to direct `generation_id` when timeline clip lookup fails, and updated the frontend attachment pipeline to pass `generation_id` through. This preserves backward compatibility for timeline clips while enabling gallery items.

**FLAG-003 (interaction scope):** Added Steps 5, 7-9 covering the user-requested lasso/marquee selection, shift+click toggle (replacing Cmd+click per user answer), and multi-item drag-to-timeline. Lasso gets its own hook. Multi-drag extends the drag data model with a new `GENERATION_MULTI_DRAG_TYPE` and updates the drop handler to place items sequentially.

Other changes: Updated modifier key from Cmd to Shift per user answer. Removed the mutual-exclusivity step (user confirmed additive). Promoted multi-drag and lasso to explicit plan steps rather than leaving them unaddressed.
questions: For multi-item drag to timeline: should clips be placed on the same track sequentially, or should each get its own track (stacked vertically)?
Should lasso selection work across pagination boundaries (i.e., remember selections from previous pages), or only within the currently visible page?

success_criteria.criterion: Single-click on a gallery item in GenerationsPane selects it with a visible highlight ring
Shift+click toggles individual gallery items in/out of multi-selection
Lasso/marquee drag on gallery background selects all items within the rectangle
Selected gallery items appear in the agent chat 'attaching N images/videos' indicator
Selected gallery items are sent as selected_clips with generation_id in the agent task submission payload
Backend resolveClipGenerationIds correctly resolves gallery generation_ids (not just timeline clip_ids)
Gallery selection only allows images and videos (not effects or music)
Existing timeline clip selection continues to work unchanged
Dragging a selected gallery item onto the timeline drops it as a clip (single item)
Dragging when multiple items are selected drops all selected items as sequential clips on the timeline
Existing useSelectedMediaClips, useItemInteraction, and useMediaGalleryViewInteractions tests pass
Gallery selection clears after a message is sent to the agent
Double-click or expand button on gallery items still opens lightbox when single-click selection is enabled
Selection highlight style is visually consistent with timeline clip selection (sky-400 ring)
Lasso rectangle renders with visible border during drag
Multi-item drag shows count badge on drag preview
New hook/context files are under ~150 lines each
Works on mobile (tap to select, second tap to deselect)

assumptions: Timeline and gallery selections are additive (both contribute to attachments) — confirmed by user
Shift+click is the modifier for toggle selection (not Cmd+click) — per user answer
Lasso initiates only from gallery background/gap space, not from items (to avoid conflicting with item drag-to-timeline)
Multi-item drag to timeline places clips sequentially with staggered offsets (not stacked on same time position)
Gallery selection is only needed in the GenerationsPane within the video editor, not the standalone gallery page — per user answer
The enableSingleClick config flag on MediaGallery is the right mechanism to switch from lightbox-on-click to select-on-click
Lightbox remains accessible via double-click or the expand/eye button on gallery items when enableSingleClick is enabled
GeneratedImageWithMetadata.type or .isVideo fields are sufficient to determine media type for the SelectedMediaClip shape
